case_title: TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. THOMAS BRUSSO

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BRUSSO, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
